data.acceptance:
1. Codex can run claimed-step and take-loop sessions in interactive mode through the shared session runtime.
2. Codex turn completion is detected from explicit Codex stream/result signals, not inferred from silence.
3. Follow-up prompts, stdin closing, process exit, watchdog timeout, retry, and abort all work under the shared protocol.
4. Tests cover successful completion, hang timeout, and retry/abort behavior for interactive Codex sessions.
